trade.summary: Singapore is India's largest trade partner in ASEAN and sixth globally. India exports refined petroleum, engineering goods, pharmaceuticals, and electronic components. Singapore exports refined petroleum (re-exports), chemicals, electronic components, and gold. The Comprehensive Economic Cooperation Agreement (CECA) governs trade.
disputes: CECA has been a political talking point in Singapore over Indian professional worker inflows

diplomatic.summary: India and Singapore have a 'Strategic Partnership'. Singapore is India's leading financial and trade gateway to ASEAN. The relationship is mature and multidimensional. India sees Singapore as a key partner for its Act East policy. Singapore has the most Indian-origin population outside the subcontinent (25%+ of citizens trace Indian ancestry). Bilateral summits are held regularly.

military.summary: Strong bilateral defence cooperation. Singapore Armed Forces train in India (Rajasthan desert exercises). Singapore operates the RSAF in India. Joint naval exercises (SIMBEX) have been conducted annually for 30 years. Singapore is one of India's closest defence partners in ASEAN.

financial.summary: Singapore is the second-largest source of FDI into India (after Mauritius, partly for tax reasons). GIC and Temasek are major investors in Indian equities and startups. Singapore's financial sector intermediates much India-related capital. Many Indian unicorn startups have Singapore holding companies. UPI linkage between India and Singapore enables cross-border digital payments.

energy.summary: India exports refined petroleum to Singapore. Cooperation on LNG trade and green energy financing. Singapore is a key hub for Indian energy companies' international operations.

scientific.summary: Deep scientific and technological cooperation. NStati Uniti and NTU have major research partnerships with IITs and IISc. Joint research in AI, biotechnology, and cybersecurity. Many Indian researchers and academics work in Singapore universities. India-Singapore cooperation on quantum computing is growing.
